articles.author: Jordan  Freiman
articles.title: American among those killed on speedboat in Cuban waters, White House confirms - CBS News
articles.description: At least one U.S. citizen was also among the six who were wounded and arrested by Cuban authorities, a U.S. official said.
articles.content: American citizens were on board a stolen speedboat that entered Cuban waters Wednesday, and at least one American was one of four people killed by Cuba's coast guard after the occupants of the boat a… [+4822 chars]

articles.author: Jake Traylor, Vaughn Hillyard
articles.title: Trump moves to rewrite election rules unilaterally - MS NOW
articles.description: The president has directed his White House counsel to explore a voter ID executive order, even as his own lawyers warn it would likely be stricken down — the latest test of his executive authority over American elections.
articles.content: WASHINGTON President Donald Trump has directed his White House counsels office to explore the feasibility of an executive order requiring proof of citizenship for voter registration and photo identif… [+8048 chars]
